name: Hallows' Eve Hex
description: Hallows' Eve Hex is the Halloween 2014 counterpart of Hex in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Hallows' Eve Hex is the Halloween 2014 counterpart of Hex in Skylanders: Lost Islands. She was released in October 2014 as a special seasonal variant of the Undead sorceress.
quote: Hallows' Eve Hex is here to cast a spell over Skylands!
personality: As a seasonal variant of Hex, Hallows' Eve Hex embraces a spooky and festive persona. Unlike her regular counterpart, she is depicted with visible hair, giving her a distinct appearance while maintaining her magical and mysterious nature.

story.content: Hallows' Eve Hex is the Halloween 2014 counterpart of Hex in Skylanders: Lost Islands. She is the second Halloween variant released in the game and is notable for being the first 2014 variant not based on a character from Skylanders: Swap Force. Unlike standard Hex, this version has visible hair.

content: Hallows' Eve Hex is here to cast a spell over Skylands!

trivia: She is the second Halloween variant in Lost Islands (the first being Skeletal Cynder).
She is also the first Lost Islands Skylander of 2014 not to be based on a Swap Force character.
Unlike her regular counterpart, she has visible hair.
She is also the third female Undead variant in Lost Islands, after Skeletal Cynder and Snowler Brawl.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Hallows' Eve Hex is an Alter Ego variant. According to her character characteristics, she does not have any specific recorded attacks, serving primarily as a collectible variant within the game's kingdom-building environment.
